name: Sunshine Orange Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
Peel the orange and cut it into quarters. Then slice the fruit across the sections or cut into a decorative pattern of your choice.
1. In a large bowl, beat margarine and sugars until light and fluffy. Add vanilla extract and blend in well.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt; add to the butter mixture alternately with sour cream and milk, beginning and ending with flour mixtures. Mix until just combined.
3. Pour batter into a greased and waxed paper-lined 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 25-35 minutes or until done.
4. Allow the cake to cool completely before removing from the pan.
5. Cut the cooled cake into two layers measuring approximately 6-1/2 by 9 inches each. Spread sour cream over one layer and arrange orange slices on top. Place second layer on top and garnish with additional sour cream and orange slices. Adjust taste if desired by sweetening sour cream with sugar, honey, or a mixture of half sour cream and half sweetened whipped cream.
